representative_quotes: Agility Robotics is literally the #1 humanoid player in the US in terms of commercialization today imo. ... at $16, you have a ~$4B MC pre-money humanoid player.
Hyperscalers bottlenecking upstream photonics confirmation validation… on all fronts from pricing, demand, to supply shortages.

Retail thinks a 30-60% drop is a “falling knife” where bagholders will never recover. … I see it as long term ownership over: - the next hyperscaler with $NBIS … - 40% of the InP supply chain with $AXTI …
